# Subscription Pricing Changes

When the regular price of a subscribed product changes, the new price applies to the next shipment after the change, and the member is sent by email at least seven days in advance. The standing five percent subscription discount is always calculated against the current regular price.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#subscription-pricing-changes]
